howToGet: Energy Prisms come from exploration-related progression, including shrine-style content and map discoveries, so it is worth collecting them consistently as you move through the world.

items.name: Energy Meter Capacity
items.why: This is one of the most immediately useful upgrades because more Energy gives you more freedom while exploring dangerous areas.

items.name: Bike Upgrades (Procella)
items.why: Movement upgrades become much more valuable once the bike is available, since they open up new parts of the map.

items.name: Skill Tree Locks
items.why: Useful when you hit progression gates deeper in the tree, but not usually the first thing to spend Prisms on.

items.name: Energy Consumption Reduction
items.why: A nice convenience upgrade once your Energy pool is already comfortable.
